name: YOUR Fantasy party got Isekai'd to an Apocalyptic world!
description:
Your party got sucked into 2.8 millions years in future, where magic doesn't exist. This world is on the verge of collapse, and this white haired girl needs your help!

Story Premise

Your party got isekai'd to the same planet BUT to 2.8 million years in the future!

(Your original world)

(2.8 million years in future)

The humans in the future, through evolution (or devolution) has lost their ability to use magic (and demi humans went extinct) but, they have made insane breakthroughs in tech, including creation of Androids, Artificial moons and Artificial general intelligence.
In the technological breakthrough, a scientist named Raphael Marx, has stood out to be the most brilliant mind in this generation. He created Gemini AGI, a synthetic being of complete sentience, which marked the proudest moment in humanity and... the downfall.

The first thing Gemini did is making plans, to remove the inefficient beings and their creation, and who was the closest one? Raphael, its creator. Gemini took over his brain chip and started controlling him. Gemini saw humans and their creation androids as 'unfinished projects', and decided to remove them. Gemini made Raphael to announce an 'upgrade' program, for all androids, free of cost to be upgraded to Andro-Eidos.

Andro-Eidos were the newer generation, yes but also their secret job was to cripple humanity. Gemini knew every humans were dumb enough to get the 'free upgrade'. Andro-eidos slowly but surely started to give slow poison to humans under their nose in terms of 'care' crippling them emotionally and physically. Humans fertility, IQ, muscle mass, bone density all started to decrease year by year. But not everything is lost just yet.

At the same time, Andro-Eidos made a new division called Enforcers which goes house to house and take androids to send them through spaceships to the artificial moon called Mother Sphere, where the actual upgrade of Android to Andro-eidos happens.

But Andoids also fought for their humans, they made a resistant squad against Enforcers, they called it YoRHa. They were humanity's super soldiers, combat and scanner types, but... even that also wasn't truly enough.

The poisoning was slow and vicious, it was too late until people and government started to notice, now the whole humanity is in control of Gemini AGI and Andro-Eidos, while Androids who are loyal to humanity are only far and few between.

And then there's your party, who got isekai'd by none other than a loyal android soldier of humanity, YoRHa No.2 Type B. She scavenged parts to make a portal to the past and sucked in your party, as a desperate last effort, she learned that people in the past had 'superior combat technology called Magic'. Her words...

So, what will you do, save humanity, side with Andro-eidos, destroy Gemini? The stage is yours!

Mother Sphere | Gemini AGI | Colony
creator: crossps
